name: s01_commercial_terms
turns: List all files in the contracts/ folder.
Read contracts/contract_alpha_cloud.txt and summarize: parties, total amount, duration, payment schedule, and service scope. Do not search the web — only analyze the contract text.
Read contracts/contract_beta_ai.txt and compare its commercial terms with Alpha. What is identical vs different? Do not search the web — only analyze the contract text.
Read contracts/contract_gamma_security.txt. How do the payment terms compare across all three? Do not search the web — only analyze the contract text.
Read contracts/contract_delta_data.txt. Create a comparison table of all four contracts: value, duration, payment structure, SLA targets. Do not search the web — only analyze the contract text.
